steps.title: Notice the evidence
steps.content: The first sentence says the statues are extremely heavy. The next sentence gives concrete proof: each statue weighs more than 5 tons. The transition needs to signal confirmation or supporting evidence.

steps.title: Rule out wrong relationships
steps.content:
• Choice B signals an earlier time, but the sentence gives evidence, not a time shift.
  • Choice C signals a regardless-of-that pivot, but no competing point is being set aside.
  • Choice D signals replacement or contrast, but the weight figure reinforces the previous claim.
The remaining choice introduces confirming evidence. The answer is A.
